title: ace's goofy enchants
description: adds a few goofy pvp enchants to the game
body:
[![BoxToPlay sponsor](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c8b7363c6efe6ca2a42eac08732aedec25d355ab.png)](https://www.boxtoplay.com/en/minecraft-hosting/minecraft-server)
Check out BoxToPlay for cheap and powerful minecraft servers (seriously, it's the one I use daily, it's great)

Requires [Pehkui](https://modrinth.com/mod/pehkui) in order to work

This mod currently adds 5 PVP enchants to the game:  
-Reflect (shield) reflects projectiles and damage  
-Size Steal (sword) well... "steals" the size of your enemies (you'll see what I mean)  
-Healing? never heard of that before (sword) reduces the max health of opponents to their current health  
-Jam (crossbow) reverts the keybinds of hit opponents for 5 seconds  
-Curse Of Reversal (chestplate) makes low damage high damage and high damage low damage (received not dealt) and also sends the effects of most enchants from the mod back at the sender (if the sender also has the enchant then both sender and receiver will blow up)  

I may add new enchants in the future
